import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing list")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing target")?
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  for tok in tokens
    let n = string.parse_int(tok).ok_or("bad int")?
    nums = __list_int_push(nums, n)
  end
  let target = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2)).ok_or("bad target")?
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len() - 1
  mut found = -1
  while lo <= hi and found == -1
    let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
    let v = nums.get(mid).ok_or("oob")?
    if v == target
      found = mid
    else if v < target
      lo = mid + 1
    else
      hi = mid - 1
    end
  end
  if found == -1
    print("not_found")
  else
    print("index=#{found}")
  end
  Ok(())
end
